title: Road lengths in Great Britain: 2024
body: "Statistics on publicly maintained roads in Great Britain for the year 2024.  In 2024, the total length of roads in Great Britain was estimated to be 246,500 miles.  There were 31,900 miles of major road in Great Britain in 2024, consisting of:   2,300 miles of motorway (98.9% centrally managed, 1.1% locally managed) 29,600 miles of ‘A’ road (18.4% centrally managed, 81.6% locally managed)   There were 214,600 miles of minor road in Great Britain in 2024, consisting of:   18,900 miles of ‘B’ road 195,700 miles of ‘C and U’ road   Our statistical practice is regulated by the Office for Statistics Regulation (OSR). OSR sets the standards of trustworthiness, quality and value in the Code of Practice for Statistics that all producers of official statistics should adhere to. You are welcome to contact us directly with any comments about how we meet these standards.  Contact us  Road length statistics     Email road.length@dft.gov.uk     Media enquiries 0300 7777 878       To hear more about DfT statistical publications as they are released, follow us on X  at DfTstats. "
